things.name: Citta Alta (Upper City)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage medieval hilltop city enclosed by Venetian walls

things.name: Venetian Walls
things.description: 16th-century UNESCO-listed walls encircling the upper city with walking path and views

things.name: Piazza Vecchia
things.description: Stunning central square of the upper city called the most beautiful square in Italy by Le Corbusier

things.name: Basilica di Santa Maria Maggiore
things.description: Romanesque basilica with extraordinary Baroque interior and Donizetti's tomb

things.name: Carrara Academy
things.description: Outstanding art collection with Raphael, Botticelli and Mantegna

things.name: Colleoni Chapel
things.description: Flamboyant Renaissance mausoleum of condottiere Bartolomeo Colleoni

things.name: Funicular Railway
things.description: Two funicular lines connecting the lower and upper cities

things.name: Donizetti Museum
things.description: Birthplace museum of opera composer Gaetano Donizetti with scores and memorabilia

things.name: Citta Bassa (Lower City)
things.description: Elegant early 20th-century lower city with Piazza Matteotti and Via XX Settembre

things.name: Castel San Vigilio
things.description: 14th-century hilltop castle above the upper city with stunning panoramic views
